race.comment: SNAPSHOT (8) six weeks between runs when she went forward with the claim to finish a narrow third over 1100m at Wodonga. Fitter now and expected to go close in a suitable race. NARCISSIST (2) lightly raced gelding resuming with a handy record. Ploughed through the heavy conditions with a dominant victory over this trip Albury on February 23. Back without a trial and gets every chance with the claim. WITH STRENGTH (3) is a handy galloper who shouldered the 62kg first-up with a gritty second over 1000m at Echuca. Goes well early in the prep and can go one better here. VOLTAGE LASS (6) smart filly who resumes with the two wins from three starts. Taken to the front and never headed with a comprehensive win over 1000m here on December 30. Primed with a 1000m Hawkesbury trial win and will need a good ride from the draw.
